title: Replanter Plus
description: Client-side mod to harvest and replant crops automatically with a single click
body: Replanter Plus is client-side only mod for harvesting and replanting crops by holding right click. The mod will automatically switch to any tool enchanted with the highest level Fortune in your hotbar to maximize crop yields. Right clicking a partially grown crop with bone meal in your hotbar will automatically offhand and use it. The following types of crops are supported: * Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroots (+Any modded block extending CropBlock) * Nether Warts * Cocoa Beans (Requires an axe with enough mining speed to instamine in hotbar) * Torch Flower * Pitcher Pod (You must click the lower half of the plant due to anticheat)
